kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Tanner and 14 coins, one goes with Aldric and the other with Edmund.
No members of the Ironmongers' Guild are in the Hill Ward.
Either Wulfric belongs to the River Ward or both members of the Ironmongers' Guild belong to the River Ward.
Either Tanner goes with Highrow or Eastcheap goes with 12 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Beatrix goes with Mason; Matilda goes with Bridgegate; Potter goes with Southgate.
If Edmund belongs to the North Side, then Southgate goes with Tanner.
Carpenter goes with exactly two of Beatrix, Highrow, and 12 coins.
Between Highrow and Oldwall, one goes with Potter and the other with 14 coins.
Tanner goes with 12 coins if and only if Tanner goes with Aldric.
The Cooper's levy is exactly 2 coins more than the artisan in Southgate.
Aldric's levy is higher than both the Blacksmith and the artisan in Eastcheap.
More members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the South Side than members of the Ironmongers' Guild.

Suppose Beatrix went with Tanner — following the clues from there hits a contradiction, so it doesn't.
chain: Start by assuming Beatrix goes with Tanner.
Tanner goes with Beatrix, so Aldric can't go with Tanner.
Tanner goes with Beatrix, so Edmund can't go with Tanner.
…but now the clue “Between Tanner and 14 coins, one goes with Aldric and the other with Edmund” can no longer hold — a contradiction.
So Beatrix does not go with Tanner.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Between Pike and 13 lb, one goes with Boone and the other with Mabel.
No members of the Sunfish Family are in the South Watershed.
Either Wade belongs to the East Watershed or both members of the Sunfish Family belong to the East Watershed.
Either Pike goes with Grayreach or Foxglen goes with 11 lb.
